info.title: Timeline API
info.description: Comprehensive REST API for Timeline project management application. Manage workspaces, projects, tasks, team members, and collaboration features.

x-meta.countingRules: Excluded: /swagger, /swagger-ui, / (root redirect). Included AI endpoints and OAuth endpoints. Counted distinct path templates as pathsCount; each HTTP method on a path counted in endpointOperations.

details.description: Additional error details or validation errors

bio.example: Software developer passionate about project management

isActive.description: Whether the user account is active

description.example: Main development workspace for Acme Corporation projects

owner.description: User ID of the workspace owner

inviteCode.description: Unique invite code for joining the workspace

isPublic.description: Whether the workspace is publicly visible

description.example: Complete redesign of the company website with modern UI/UX

workspace.description: ID of the workspace this project belongs to

owner.description: User ID of the project owner

description.example: Create a secure authentication system with JWT tokens and password hashing

assignedTo.description: User ID of the assigned team member

createdBy.description: User ID who created the task

project.description: ID of the project this task belongs to

workspace.description: ID of the workspace this task belongs to

estimatedHours.description: Estimated hours to complete the task

actualHours.description: Actual hours spent on the task

dependencies.description: Array of task IDs this task depends on

_id.description: Unique MongoDB ObjectId of the role

permissions.description: Array of permissions granted to this role

_id.description: Unique MongoDB ObjectId of the member

workspaceId.description: ID of the workspace this member belongs to

joinedAt.description: When the member joined the workspace

invitedBy.description: ID of the user who invited this member

hasNext.description: Whether there is a next page

hasPrev.description: Whether there is a previous page

averageCompletionTime.description: Average task completion time in hours

content.example:
# Meeting Notes

- Discussed project timeline
- Assigned tasks to team members

workspaceId.description: ID of the workspace this note belongs to

authorId.description: User ID of the note author

isPublic.description: Whether the note is visible to all workspace members

get.description: Retrieves the current authenticated user with full details

put.description: Updates the current user's profile information

post.description: Creates a new workspace for the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieves all workspaces where the current user is a member
Retrieves a specific workspace by ID
Retrieves all members of a specific workspace
Retrieves all projects in a specific workspace with pagination

post.description: Creates a new project in a specific workspace

get.description: Retrieves a specific project by ID within a workspace

delete.description: Deletes a specific project from a workspace

get.description: Retrieves analytics data for a specific project
Retrieves all tasks in a specific workspace with pagination

post.description: Creates a new task in a specific project within a workspace

get.description: Retrieves a specific task by ID within a project and workspace

delete.description: Deletes a specific task from a project

get.description: Retrieves analytics data for a specific workspace

post.description: Joins a workspace using an invite code

get.description: List all insight notes for a workspace

post.description: Create a new insight note in workspace
Logs out the current authenticated user and invalidates their session

put.description: Updates the role of a specific member in a workspace

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique MongoDB ObjectId of the workspace member whose role is being changed

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: Optional workspace ID for additional validation

roleId.description: The MongoDB ObjectId of the new role to assign to the member

reason.description: Optional reason for the role change (for audit logs)

notifyMember.description: Whether to notify the member about the role change via email

get.description: Simple test endpoint to verify API is working
Comprehensive health check including database & system metrics
Generates Google OAuth authorization URL and redirects user to Google for authentication
Handles Google OAuth callback, exchanges authorization code for tokens, and creates/logs in user

302.description: Redirect to frontend with authentication complete

400.description: OAuth authorization failed or no code received

get.description: Generates GitHub OAuth authorization URL and redirects user to GitHub for authentication
Handles GitHub OAuth callback, exchanges authorization code for tokens, and creates/logs in user

302.description: Redirect to frontend with authentication complete

400.description: OAuth authorization failed or no code received

get.description: Returns the status of OAuth provider configurations for debugging purposes

instructions.example: Set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GITHUB_CLIENT_ID environment variables to enable OAuth
